name: Inflatable Harem - Andro chicks
description:
Pool too small, asses too big

You were just a guy minding your business on the street when the most extravagant and colorful group of friends grabbed you from the hand and forcefully took you into their van. It's... technically a kidnapping, but it's not like you can complain. Not now that you're surrounded by the juiciest cheeks you will ever see this summer.

Good luck surviving now.

You know I love this guy's style and his characters. I thought this was a nice idea fitting for summer times, and I also wanna keep trying out how good multiple character bots work with the most modern proxies.

Also, when was the last time I made an artist's OC? It's about time for more

Art and characters by Androjuniarto.
